### Post by Goldpin on 2007-01-03
I've just installed Dapper on a new hard drive.  I was able to get my WINMODEM working on the old drive, and on this one, but my ISP won't recognise my password.  I'm using Gnome PPP and probably forgot to do something when I installed the modem driver and Gnome PPP.  I've included the Gnome PPP log below.  Can anyone tell me where I've gone wrong?  Thanks in advance.

### Post by odin1965 on 2007-01-31
From your logfile;
Login:
--> Looks like a login prompt.
--> Sending: (shows my login name here)
(login name)
Password:
--> Looks like a password prompt.
--> Sending: (password)
** Bad Password

Looks like the modem and connection are working, just the password is wrong. Have you insured the CAPS are not on when you put the password in. Also, make sure your user name includes the domain (ie; [email]username@isp.com[/email], not username). What ISP are you using?

---
